user_feedback: can you make the enemies in the medium map faster with more health than the easy map, and can you make the hard enemies faster with more health more than the medium map?
analysis:
- Issue identified: Enemies currently have the same health and speed stats across all maps (Easy, Medium, Hard), with difficulty only affecting enemy count and composition. The user requested that enemies be faster and have more health on Medium, and even faster/more health on Hard.
- Files affected: `entities.js`, `waveManager.js`
- Changes needed:
  1.  Modify the `Enemy` class in `entities.js` to accept `healthMultiplier` and `speedMultiplier` in its constructor, separate from the implicit wave multiplier logic.
  2.  Update `spawnNextEnemy` in `waveManager.js` to calculate these multipliers based on the current map (Medium: 1.5x Health / 1.2x Speed, Hard: 2.0x Health / 1.4x Speed) and pass them when creating enemies.
